name: @react-record/devtools-parity-app
description: Electron app for verifying parity between stock react-devtools and the recorder + devtools-custom pipeline.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist *.tsbuildinfo && tsc -b tsconfig.main.json tsconfig.renderer.json && cp src/windows/home/app/index.html dist/windows/home/app/index.html && vite build
